original: the
The
The battlesuit runs fine.
The Raskvel Battlesuit glides out of reach on titanium wheels!
The armor plates soak up your attack.
steel plates
steel gray

The energy flow building up in the Battlesuit’s head stops, cut short by your timely intervention. A moment later, the main capacitor short-circuits in a deluge of sparks. They won’t be able to use this attack again, but you aren’t safe yet!
“YOU WANT MORE! HERE’S MORE!”\n\n\t\tA back-mounted capacitor pulses, supercharging all systems with energy. The Raskvel Battlesuit‘s shield comes back only in a thunderous jolt of lightning.

“I AIN‘T DOWN YET!” “Master, may Lily kindly remark that she’s the one getting hit,” the VI groans back. In the blink of an eye, hundreds of tiny, insectile droids swarm the war machine‘s injured plates and exposed mechanisms with micro-blowtorches. The Raskvel Battlesuit will be harder to take down.

“STINKY CHEATER! LILYBELLE! ACTIVATE THE COUNTERMEASURES!” “Roger Roger, Master. Deploying [silly |apocrypha |pulse ] generator.” A coil-like device springs to life and shrouds the Raskvel Battlesuit in a protective bubble. You won’t be able to stun her with EMP grenades as long as it’s up!
The Raskvel Battlesuit’s autocannons blast a deluge of explosive projectiles!
The piercing bullets go wide!
The burning bullets hit you square in the chest!
The Raskvel Battlesuit’s auto-loaders chamber pink rounds into its guns.\n\n\t\t“GET A LOAD OF THIS!”
The toxic loads harmlessly splatters on the ground!
The toxic bullet connects with you! Your heartbeat rises and your focus plummets as the vibrant pink liquid spreads an arousing warmth through your veins!
The Raskvel Battlesuit lunges at you with its Grinding Claws!
The lumbering strike goes wide!
The heavy claw hits you where it hurts!
The powerful lunge staggers you!
The Raskvel Battlesuit raises its claws and frontal shield. Hidden pistons move, deploying wheels under the machine’s feet a moment before a secondary engine roars to life!\n\n“I‘M GONNA CRUSH YOU!”

You leap sideways, avoiding the Battlesuit’s charge by a hair’s breadth! The cumbersome machine continues her course for a few seconds before drifting back on course on screeching wheels. They’ll be harder to hit now!

The Raskvel Battlesuit ".concat(e.isTripped()?"runs you over":"overruns you","! The war machine turns around and rolls toward you, weapons at the ready to finish you off. Until her secondary engine fails, she’ll be harder to hit!")

The Raskvel Battlesuit stands high on her legs as missile launchers extend from its back! “Multi-missile system locked and loaded! Cryo-missiles ready to fire!” “GOOD WORK, LILYBELLE! ALL SYSTEMS, FIRE!” A salvo of warheads flies your way!
The missile goes wide!
The cryo-missile hits you square in the chest, engulfing you in a chilly nimbus!
The glacial fog [silly|transforms you into a walking icicle|leaves you deeply frozen]!

“Grappling claw locked on and ready to fire!” “FINALLY! YOU WON’T ESCAPE ME THIS TIME!” The VI’s [rand|left|right] claw opens wide. Small rockets on its back flares to life, propelling it like [silly|an atlatl|a javelin]!

The grappling claw misses you! “NOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOO! LILYBELLE, DO SOMETHING!” “Lilybelle is not responsible for Master’s poor aim. Try again later.” The Mad Rask angrily complains within his creation while hidden servomotors tug the crane-like limb back in place. You have to finish them up before they pull this trick again!

The rocket-propelled claw closes on you and pins you to the ground! “YES! TAKE THAT YOU STUPID GOON! LILYBELLE! TEAR [pc.mf|HIM|HER] TO SHRED!” “[silly|To shreds you say?|Roger Roger!] Initiating Fusion Grinders!” Fusion Grinders? You must get out of this snare, quickly!
The hardlight chainsaw teeth lining the inside of the claw roar, hitting you where it hurts!

“I’VE HAD ENOUGH OF YOU! LILYBELLE, ACTIVATE THE [silly|MACHINE OF UNSPEAKABLE DOOM|ANNIHILATOR]!” “Roger Roger, Master! Priming plasma generator!” A huge capacitor on the Battlesuit’s back blazes alive and directs energy to the war machine’s head! If you don’t stop them now, you’ll surely have a very bad time!
“THIS TIME, I‘LL TAKE YOU DOWN!” The Raskvel Battlesuit’s eyes glow red before firing searing beams of light! [silly|“I‘m firin’ my lazor :3”]

Fortunately, you evade the devastating beams of light! “NOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOO! LILYBELLE, RECHARGE THE LASER EYES!” “Power supply insufficient.” They won’t be able to use this trick again, but it doesn’t mean you are safe!
The red laser beams hit you square in the chest!

“LILYBELLE, FIRE THE DEGENERATE MATTER PULSE!” “[silly|Yeeeeeeeeeeah! Booby shot :3|Roger Roger! Deploying mindwave emitters.]” The Raskvel Battlesuit’s busty frontrack starts shaking and its nipple-like tips stiffen, revealing a glowing pink antenna array. They shine with power for a couple of seconds before releasing waves of [silly|magenta|fuchsia] energy! The pinkish flametongues wrap around you, storming your senses with kinky visions, seductive scents, and a lurid warmth.
You resist the deluge of arousing images and lewd stimuli flooding your mind!
Your cheeks turn crimson and you have to stop yourself from masturbating and groping your assets!

Hundreds of sparks come out of the Raskvel Battlesuit’s joints. Its servomotors and piston vibrate erratically and its subsystems die one after the other - either short-circuited or energy-starved. Lilybelle and the Mad Rask are out of commission!
The mad rask is too horny and his machine is too jealous to continue fighting!
